bird.name: Island imperial pigeon
bird.summary: The island imperial pigeon or floury imperial pigeon (Ducula pistrinaria) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found in the…

locations.name: 俾斯麦群岛
locations.summary: 俾斯麦群岛（英文：Bismarck Archipelago）是太平洋西南部一群岛，位于新几内亚岛东北，濒临俾斯麦海，由200多个岛屿组成，总陆地面积49700平方公里，主要岛屿有新不列颠岛、新爱尔兰岛等，人口31.4万人，现全部属于巴布亚…

locations.name: 所羅門群島 (群島)
locations.summary: 所羅門群島是太平洋西南面的群島，位於澳大利亞東北方的美拉尼西亞（Melanesia）地區。西隔所羅門海與新幾內亞、俾斯麥群島相鄰。 政治上分屬兩個政治實體： 所罗门群岛，領土範圍為大部分的索羅門群島（28,896 km²，660,121人…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Island imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: It is found in the Bismarck Archipelago and the Solomon Islands archipelago, living in primary and secondary forests and mangroves

relations.subject: Island imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: It is found in the Bismarck Archipelago and the Solomon Islands archipelago, living in primary and secondary forests and mangroves

relations.subject: Island imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: This pigeon is found in the Bismarck Archipelago, the Solomon Islands archipelago and small islands to the north and east of New Guinea. Its habitat is coastal primary forest, old secondary forest, mangroves and some disturbed habitats

relations.subject: Island imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: This pigeon is found in the Bismarck Archipelago, the Solomon Islands archipelago and small islands to the north and east of New Guinea. Its habitat is coastal primary forest, old secondary forest, mangroves and some disturbed habitats
